bot:
Car Name: Tesla Model 3
Manufacturer: Tesla

Engine: Dual Electric Motors (Performance/Long Range) or Single Electric Motor (Rear-Wheel Drive)

Top Speed: 140 mph (225 km/h) to 162 mph (261 km/h), varies by trim

Horsepower: Approximately 283 hp (Rear-Wheel Drive) to 510 hp (Performance), varies by trim

Torque: Approximately 310 lb-ft (Rear-Wheel Drive) to 471 lb-ft (Performance), varies by trim

Mileage / Range: Approximately 272 miles (438 km) to 333 miles (536 km) per full charge, EPA estimated, varies by trim and model year

Fuel Type: Electric

Transmission: Single-speed Fixed Gear

Price Range: Approximately $38,990 - $53,990+ USD (Varies by trim, options, and region; prices are subject to change by Tesla)

Key Features:
*   Large 15-inch Central Touchscreen Display
*   Autopilot and Optional Full Self-Driving Capability
*   Over-the-Air (OTA) Software Updates
*   All-Glass Roof
*   Access to Tesla's Supercharger Network
*   Minimalist Interior Design
*   Rapid Acceleration
*   Advanced Safety Features

user: What is the mileage of Innova?
bot:
Car Name: Toyota Innova
Manufacturer: Toyota

Engine:
*   2.7L 4-cylinder Petrol (older variants like Innova Crysta)
*   2.4L 4-cylinder Turbo-Diesel (Innova Crysta)
*   2.0L 4-cylinder Petrol (Innova Hycross NA)
*   2.0L 4-cylinder Strong Hybrid Petrol (Innova Hycross Hybrid)

Top Speed: Approximately 160-175 km/h (varies by variant and engine)

Horsepower:
*   Petrol: 164 - 174 hp
*   Diesel: 148 - 172 hp
*   Strong Hybrid: 183 hp (combined output)

Torque:
*   Petrol: 205 - 245 Nm
*   Diesel: 343 - 360 Nm
*   Strong Hybrid: 188 Nm (engine) + electric motor torque

Mileage / Range:
*   Petrol (older/NA): 9-16 km/l (depending on variant and driving conditions)
*   Diesel: 12-15 km/l (depending on variant and driving conditions)
*   Strong Hybrid (Innova Hycross): Up to 23.24 km/l (ARAI certified, market dependent)

Fuel Type: Petrol, Diesel, Petrol-Electric Hybrid

Transmission: 5-speed Manual, 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter), e-CVT (for Hybrid)

Price Range: Depending on market, variant, and generation, typically ranges from $25,000 - $45,000 USD equivalent (or INR 18.92 - 30.68 Lakhs in India for current models).

Key Features:
*   Spacious 7 or 8-seater configuration, ideal for families
*   Renowned Toyota reliability, build quality, and durability
*   Comfort-focused ride quality suitable for long journeys
*   Available with a highly fuel-efficient strong hybrid powertrain (Innova Hycross)
*   Modern infotainment system with smartphone connectivity
*   Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems (ADAS) like adaptive cruise control, lane-keeping assist (in top-end Hycross variants)
*   Premium features in top variants include ventilated seats, powered tailgate, and panoramic sunroof (Hycross)
